steps.title: Recall the definition of mean
steps.content:
The mean is the average of all values, calculated by dividing the sum of all values by the number of values.

$$\text{Mean} = \frac{\text{Sum of all values}}{\text{Number of values}}$$

We have 5 lemur masses: 3,910; 3,910; 3,130; 3,950; 3,150.

steps.title: Add all masses and divide by 5
steps.content:
Add the five masses:

$$3,910 + 3,910 + 3,130 + 3,950 + 3,150 = 18,050$$

Divide by 5:

$$\frac{18,050}{5} = 3,610$$

The mean mass of the 5 ruffed lemurs is 3,610 grams.
